title: Dandelion X
description: A charmingly simple pack with a cohesive color palette resulting in textures that flow together effortlessly.  Dandelion X is a continuation of the original Dandelion by Steelfeathers.
body:
06/16/2026
Dandelion X 26.2
for Minecraft 26.2

v26.2 adds:

Added all Sulfur textures:
-Sulfur Block (+ random variant), Potent Sulfur, Polished Sulfur, Sulfur Bricks (+ random variant), Chiseled Sulfur, Sulfur Spikes
Added all Cinnabar textures:
-Cinnabar Block (+ random variant), Polished Cinnabar, Cinnabar Bricks (+ random variant), Chiseled Cinnabar

Tweaked the shape of many Brick textures:
-Stone, Mossy Stone, Cracked Stone, Deepslate, Cracked Deepslate, Tuff, Polished Blackstone, Cracked Polished Blackstone
Reworked texture of some Bricks:
-Stone Bricks (& Cracked), Tuff Bricks, and Polished Blackstone Bricks (+ random variant) [& Cracked (+ random variant)]
Reworked Blackstone (+ random variant), and Gilded Blackstone textures

Recolored Nether Bricks and Red Nether Bricks (+ random variant) textures
Reworked Chiseled Nether Bricks texture
Reworked Nether Brick Fence texture
Added Red Nether Brick random variant texture
Randomized textures for Nether Brick (and Red Nether Brick) Stairs, Slabs, and Walls
Recolored Netherrack textures

Reworked Block of Netherite texture
Smoothed textures for Diamond, Redstone, Lapis, Emerald and Gold Blocks
Reworked Ancient Debris textures

Reworked Eyeblossom textures Added shading to Firefly Bush model
Added shading to Dripstone (and Sulfur Spikes) model

Added animated Red Glazed Terracotta only found at Ominous Vaults [Optifine/ETF]
Added Bucket of Sulfur Cube (Sulfur Cube of Bucket) item texture
Added Sulfer Cube Spawn Egg item texture
Added Sulfur Spike item texture
Added Bounce Music Disc texture
Added Spawn Egg textures:
-Cave Spider, Spider, Slime, Magma Cube, Wither Skeleton, Piglin, Creaking, Blaze and Breeze

Added Geyser Poof, Plume and Base particle textures
Added Noxious Gas particle textures
Added Friends List GUI
Reworked entire Netherite color palette
Reworked Lapis Armor Trim color palette
Updated many GUI Buttons and Icons
Tweaked Horse, Llama, and Nautilus GUI

Fixed Bed, Sign and Hanging Sign textures for the new block based rendering
Fixed broken connected textures when Chiseled Tuff and Chiseled Tuff Bricks are above a Copper Bulb or Copper Blocks (Trial Chambers) [Optifine/ETF]


Check out the full changelog list in the download page for all the changes
Previous Updates:
Dandelion X 26.1
for Minecraft 26.1
03/24/2026 v26.1 added:

Added all Baby textures:
Rabbit, Cow, Cat, Chicken, Pig, Sheep, Wolf, Horse, Dolphin, Squid, Glow Squid, Turtle, Axolotl, Bee, Fox, Camel, Armadillo, Polar Bear, Llama, Zombie, Husk, Gurgle, Piglin, Zombified Piglin, Villager, Zombie Villager, Hoglin, Zoglin, Snifflet, Strider, Panda

Added all Baby Armor textures
Added Leather Horse Armor textures
Added Netherite Horse Armor texture
Reworked Horse Saddle textures

Added Golden Dandelion texture
Added Panda textures
Reworked Adult Cat Collar to resemble a neckerchief (Baby Cat Collar resembles a harness)
Reworked Adult Fox textures
Reworked Rabbit textures

Added Spawn Egg item textures:
Wolf, Armadillo, Bee, Fox, Goat, Llama, Ocelot, Panda, Rabbit, Polar Bear, Axolotl, Dolphin, Glow Squid, Squid, Turtle, Mooshroom, Sniffer, Trader Llama, Zombie Villager, Villager, Hoglin, Piglin, Zoglin, Zombified Piglin

Improved Llama, Horse and Nautilus GUI
Added Breath of the Nautilus Effect Icon


Check out the full changelog list in the download page for all the changes
04/11/2026 v26.1b added:

Added Baby textures for custom named variants for:
   Black Wolf (Inky), Snowy Wolf (Steelfeathers), and Snifflet (Juniper)

Added Baby textures for random variants for:
   Cold Cow, Temperate Cow, Warm Cows, and Polar Bear


Fixed missing Pale Oak falling leaves particle texture
Fixed ghost leaves when using shaders



12/09/2025
Dandelion X 1.21 Release 8
for Minecraft 1.21.11

v1.21 Release 8 added:

Added Nautilus, Baby Nautilus, Zombie Nautilus, and Coral Nautilus textures
Added Nautilus Armor textures
Added Parched texture
Added Camel Husk textures
Added Zombie Horse texture

Tweaked Skeleton Horse texture
Added Leather Horse Armor textures
Added Netherite Horse Armor texture
Reworked Horse Saddle textures

Reworked Sheep textures
Reworked Zombie texture
Reworked Husk texture
Reworked Drowned texture

Added all Spear item textures
Added all Nautilus Armor item textures
Added Camel, Camel Husk, Donkey, Drowned, Horse, Husk, Mule, Nautilus, Parched, Skeleton Horse, Zombie, Zombie Horse, and Zombie Nautilus Spawn Egg textures
Reworked all Horse Armor item textures

Added End Flash texture
Slightly randomized animation of Kelp
Tweaked color of the crosshair to make it more visible, more often
Added all new GUI icons

Fixed and cleaned up all Horse textures
Fixed broken chain on Hanging Soul Lanterns
Fixed incorrect GUI text colors when using the Polytone mod


Optifine features:

Added rare pristine variants of Zombie, Husk and Drowned [Optifine/ETF]
Made all bricks connected texture overlays only work only with other bricks [Optifine/Continuity]
Fixed broken randomized Pig textures [Optifine/ETF]
Fixed old texture for Quartz Bricks connected textures [Optifine/Continuity]


Check out the full changelog list in the download page for all the changes


09/30/2025
Dandelion X 1.21 Release 7
for Minecraft 1.21.9

v1.21 Release 7 added:

Added Copper Golem textures

Added all new Copper textures including:
   All Tool textures
   Armor and Horse Armor textures
   Chain textures and 3D models
   Lantern textures and 3D models
   Bars textures and 3D models
   Torch textures

Reworked Copper Grate textures
Reworked Lightning Rod texture and added new variants

Reworked entire Orange color palette - changed all Orange based blocks to a single orange color palette
Reworked Red, Orange, Yellow and regular Terracotta colors
Reworked Acacia Plank textures
Reworked Mangrove Log top textures slightly


Reworked Quartz Block texture (Thanks to Steelfeathers!)
Tweaked Quartz Bricks and Chiseled Quartz Block top textures (Thanks to Steelfeathers!)
Tweaked the side textures of all Trapdoors - making them cleaner and more usable

Added Lava Chicken Disc texture
Added Snow precipitation texture
Added ambient occlusion to Wheat

Fixed Azalea and Flowering Azalea Leaves becoming biome tinted when using Optifine
Fixed Donkey Saddle texture


Check out the full changelog list in the download page for all the changes


06/17/2025
Dandelion X 1.21 Release 6
for Minecraft 1.21.6

v1.21 Release 6 added:

Added all Happy Ghast textures including:
   16 Ghast Harness textures
   Baby Happy Ghast texture
   Ghast Ropes texture

Reworked Strider textures

Reworked Calico and Ragdoll Cat textures to feature chloë's Sophie and Howl
Reworked Jellie Cat texture to better represent GoodTimesWithScar's Jellie
Improved eyes for all Cat textures

Added Vanilla CIT textures (Custom Item Textures):
   Bucket of Axolotl CITs based on each variant
   Diamond & Netherite Sword CITs that stack based on equipped enchantments:
      Fire Aspect, Looting, Mending, Unbreaking, and Sharpness
   Diamond & Netherite Pickaxe CITs that stack based on equipped enchantments:
      Fortune, Mending, Unbreaking, Efficiency, and Silk Touch

Added Music Toast textures
Added all Player Locator Bar GUI textures
Added all Happy Ghast Harness item textures
Added Strider Egg item texture

Fixed broken texture for a randomized Temperate Cow


Optifine features:

Added a cuter version of the Happy Ghast when named omg (Optifine/ETF)
Added a custom cat model to include bushier tails for some cats (Optifine/ETF)


Check out the full changelog list in the download page for all the changes


03/25/2025
Dandelion X 1.21 Release 5
for Minecraft 1.21.5

v1.21 Release 5 added:

Added all Cold/Warm Variant for Cows, Chickens, and Pigs
Updated Sheep for new Fur and Undercoat textures

Added Wildflowers textures
Added Short/Tall Dry Grass textures
Added Firefly Bush textures, and a random variant too
Added Bush texture
Added Leaf Litter texture
Reworked Sweet Berry Bush textures
Added Dormant state textures for the Creaking Heart
Animated Lapis Lazuli Ore textures
Added Orange Glazed Terracota texture (Thanks to iNSaNiTeaR!)

Added Blue and Brown Chicken Egg textures
Added Cow, Pig, Chicken, Sheep, and Creeper Spawn Egg textures
Animated Lapis Lazuli item texture

Added support for Greek alphabet characters in the Dandelion style (Thanks Dakota Arthur!)
Tweaked the GUI Highlight overlay textures
Removed blur effect from Enchanted Item and Armor Glints
Improved Ooozing effect icon
Added Raid Omen particle texture
Recolored Raid Omen effect icon

Fixed and updated Magma Cube texture for new vanilla model
Fixed broken Enchanted Glint for Armor


Optifine features:

Added random variations for Cold and Warm Cows
Added random variation for Warm Pig
Cleaned up and improved Spruce Leaves CTM textures
Fixed CTM breaking Pale Oak Leaves' dangling portions
Fixed CTM breaking Mangrove Leaves
Fixed miscolored Pale Oak Leaves


Check out the full changelog list in the download page for all the changes


Join the Dandelion Discord, share builds, get sneak peeks at new textures and get notifications for future Dandelion X updates!


Vanilla Friendly Custom Item Textures

Dandelion X includes vanilla friendly CITs for stuff like: Bucket of Axolotl CITs based on each variant Diamond & Netherite Sword CITs that stack based on equipped enchantments:
`Fire Aspect, Looting, Mending, Unbreaking, and Sharpness` Diamond & Netherite Pickaxe CITs that stack based on equipped enchantments:
`Fortune, Mending, Unbreaking, Efficiency, and Silk Touch`

## Vanilla Friendly Randomized Textures

Many textures have randomized textures: Logs, Planks, Nether Stems, Warped Wart, Soul Sand, Bookshelves, Crimson Roots, Weeping Vines, End Bricks, Glow Lichen, Polished Basalt, Polished Diorite, Purpurs, Jungle Leaves, Mossy Cobblestone, Sandstone, Bedrock, End Stone, Netherrack, Sea Grass, Amethyst, Sculk, Copper, some particles, and more!

## Vanilla Friendly Animations

Many textures have custom animations: Amethyst, Command Blocks, Structure Blocks, Crying Obsidian, Crimson Stems, Warped Stems, Glowstone, Kelp, Sea Grasses, Lanterns, Magma, Nether Portal, Prismarine, Redstone Dust, Respawn Anchors, Sculk, Sculk Catalysts, Sculk Sensors, Sculk Shriekers, Sculk Veins, Smoker, Stonecutter, some particles and more!

## Vanilla Friendly Custom Models

3D Doors and Trapdoors Overyhangy Moss 3D Fence, Fence Gates and Iron Bars with unique textures Pressure Plates and Buttons with unique textures Custom Models for: Cartography Table, Jukebox, Lectern, Loom, Stonecutter, Carved Pumpkin

## Vanilla Fixes

Many vanilla quirks have been altered: Campfires have ash removed when not lit, Cobwebs and Hanging Roots no longer appear to glow in unlit areas, Deepslate Ores have unique textures for the top and bottom faces, Flower Pots have a fixed bottom face, Item Frames and Glow Item Frames have unique borders, fixed Iron Bars' flickering texture, and more
